description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Fix article title: Bootstrapping Phase > Delegate Onboarding Process
summary: Fix article title: Bootstrapping Phase > Delegate Onboarding Process
description:
As per ratified SAEP-05: https://forum.sky.money/t/saep-05-modify-delegate-framework/27409#p-104776-option-1-for-9

Thank you, @aa-lex

diff: The Spark Foundation manages Delegate onboarding. The Spark Foundation may onboard a Delegate at its discretion. Minimum onboarding requirements are (1) identity and contact information, (2) Delegate wallet address, and (3) a signed acceptance of

[A.6.1.1.1.3.1.3.3 - Delegate Responsibilities](f230ba4e-eb5a-444e-b07a-13a0292338bd). The Spark Foundation conducts identity verification, conflict-of-interest collection, and sanctions and undue-risk checks as it deems necessary. Upon acceptance, the Foundation notifies the Operational Facilitator, who updates [A.6.1.1.1.3.1.3.8 - Registry of Delegates](f49a1e26-f774-4fbd-b7f8-156639e077f2)
and posts a notice on the Sky Forum.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
